summary: Validated requested navbar routing and dashboard nearby-clinics UX on public URL with geolocation enabled. Client-side navigation works (Home -> / then logged-in redirect to /dashboard; Dashboard/Clinics nav preserved SPA state), nearby clinics map remains visible with 4 clinic cards and View on Map re-centering. Additional auth playbook checks found security/compliance gaps.

critical.issue: Login response does not set an app auth/session httpOnly cookie (JWT only returned in JSON body).
CORS preflight returns Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * and no Access-Control-Allow-Credentials=true for explicit frontend origin.
No brute-force lockout after 5 invalid attempts; 6th invalid attempt still returns 401 instead of lockout/throttle status.

action_items: Implement secure cookie-based auth session for login (httpOnly, secure, sameSite) if playbook requirement is mandatory.
Fix CORS configuration for credentialed auth flows using explicit allowed origins (no wildcard).
Add account lockout/rate-limit policy after repeated failed login attempts.
Implement/confirm seed_admin idempotent update flow when admin password changes (not present in current backend code).
critical_code_review_comments: Server code has no seed_admin flow; only seed_demo_user exists and exits early when user exists, so password update path is missing.
Frontend correctly uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL and client-side NavLink routing; no full reload detected in requested nav flows.
Nearby clinics section is clear and responsive in tested desktop/mobile states, and /api/clinics data is MOCKED by design.
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI scope requested in this ticket is passing on public URL. Auth playbook gaps are reproducible via /app/backend/tests/test_auth_playbook_requirements.py. Note: /api/clinics is MOCKED and intentionally returns 4 nearby clinic cards in this environment.
rca of the issue: Auth architecture currently relies on bearer token response body/localStorage flow and does not implement cookie-session hardening, brute-force lockout controls, or seed_admin update logic. Repro: run pytest on test_auth_playbook_requirements.py with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from frontend/.env; failures occur on cookie semantics, credentialed CORS headers, and lockout behavior.
